expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md explicitly states: "Case focus explicitly covered via fixture adjacency signals: prompt handling; template save; report builder loading; visible report title outcomes". result.md further enumerates the four focus areas and maps adjacent issues to each (e.g., "This benchmark checks that Phase 4a scenario drafting ... can capture, at minimum: 1) Prompt handling 2) Template save 3) Report builder loading 4) Visible report title outcomes").

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Both files anchor to phase4a: execution_notes.md says "Primary phase under test: phase4a" and result.md labels "Verdict (phase4a / advisory)" and includes a dedicated "Phase 4a alignment" section referencing `references/phase4a-contract.md` requirements and phase4a workflow (calling scripts/phase4a.sh, producing drafts/qa_plan_phase4a...).
